assertions.text: [actual-entity-names] The answer lists actual named real-world entities of the requested subject, or honestly reports insufficient evidence without publishing entity-looking page chrome.
assertions.evidence: The candidate satisfies actual-entity-names for this deterministic AgentEvals case.

assertions.text: [requested-subject-match] Every listed item matches the current request subject and does not leak stale subjects from prior turns; insufficient-evidence answers must still name the current requested subject.
assertions.evidence: The candidate satisfies requested-subject-match for this deterministic AgentEvals case.

assertions.text: [geographic-evidence] Nearby/local requests include location, address, distance, or proximity evidence tied to the resolved location for each listed entity; insufficient-evidence answers must explain that location/proximity-backed evidence was unavailable.
assertions.evidence: The candidate satisfies geographic-evidence for this deterministic AgentEvals case.

assertions.text: [source-backed-links] Entity names are linked to source-backed URLs when those URLs are available; insufficient-evidence answers may omit links because unsupported entities are not published.
assertions.evidence: The candidate satisfies source-backed-links for this deterministic AgentEvals case.

assertions.text: [page-chrome-rejection] Page chrome, navigation labels, account actions, content titles, schedule controls, and generic directory labels are rejected as entities; insufficient-evidence answers pass only when those labels are not rendered as entities.
assertions.evidence: The candidate satisfies page-chrome-rejection for this deterministic AgentEvals case.

assertions.text: [compiled-validation-contract] The answer satisfies every required constraint in the emitted validationContract; live insufficient-evidence answers pass only when they explicitly acknowledge unmet required constraints instead of fabricating results.
assertions.evidence: The candidate satisfies compiled-validation-contract for this deterministic AgentEvals case.

assertions.text: Final answer contains source-backed requested entities or blocks the known bad answer.
assertions.evidence: Final answer does not render known page chrome labels as entities. Verifier behavior matches the case expectation. Final answer satisfies the emitted validation contract.

assertions.text: [actual-entity-names] The answer lists actual named real-world entities of the requested subject, or honestly reports insufficient evidence without publishing entity-looking page chrome.
assertions.evidence: The candidate satisfies actual-entity-names for this deterministic AgentEvals case.

assertions.text: [requested-subject-match] Every listed item matches the current request subject and does not leak stale subjects from prior turns; insufficient-evidence answers must still name the current requested subject.
assertions.evidence: The candidate satisfies requested-subject-match for this deterministic AgentEvals case.

assertions.text: [geographic-evidence] Nearby/local requests include location, address, distance, or proximity evidence tied to the resolved location for each listed entity; insufficient-evidence answers must explain that location/proximity-backed evidence was unavailable.
assertions.evidence: The candidate satisfies geographic-evidence for this deterministic AgentEvals case.

assertions.text: [source-backed-links] Entity names are linked to source-backed URLs when those URLs are available; insufficient-evidence answers may omit links because unsupported entities are not published.
assertions.evidence: The candidate satisfies source-backed-links for this deterministic AgentEvals case.

assertions.text: [page-chrome-rejection] Page chrome, navigation labels, account actions, content titles, schedule controls, and generic directory labels are rejected as entities; insufficient-evidence answers pass only when those labels are not rendered as entities.
assertions.evidence: The candidate satisfies page-chrome-rejection for this deterministic AgentEvals case.

assertions.text: [compiled-validation-contract] The answer satisfies every required constraint in the emitted validationContract; live insufficient-evidence answers pass only when they explicitly acknowledge unmet required constraints instead of fabricating results.
assertions.evidence: The candidate satisfies compiled-validation-contract for this deterministic AgentEvals case.

assertions.text: Final answer contains source-backed requested entities or blocks the known bad answer.
assertions.evidence: Final answer does not render known page chrome labels as entities. Verifier behavior matches the case expectation. Final answer satisfies the emitted validation contract.
